expected-messages.message: Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.stream().forEach(..)` with `.forEach(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.stream().toArray(..)` with `.toArray(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `Collections.singleton(..).stream()` with `Stream.of(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `Collections.emptyList().stream()` with `Stream.empty()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.filter(..).findFirst().isPresent()` with `.anyMatch(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.filter(..).findFirst().isPresent()` with `.anyMatch(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.filter(..).findFirst().isPresent()` with `.anyMatch(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.filter(..).findFirst().isPresent()` with `.anyMatch(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.collect(counting())` with `.count()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.collect(maxBy(..))` with `.max(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.collect(mapping(..))` with `.map(..).collect(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.collect(reducing(..))` with `.reduce(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.collect(summingInt(..))` with `.mapToInt(..).sum()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.mapToObj(x -> x)` with `.boxed()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.mapToObj(x -> x)` with `.boxed()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.mapToObj(x -> x)` with `.boxed()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.mapToObj(x -> x)` with `.boxed()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.sorted(..).findFirst()` with `.min(..)`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.sorted().findFirst()` with `.min()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.sorted().findFirst()` with `.min()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.sorted().findFirst()` with `.min()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.sorted().findFirst()` with `.min()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.orElseGet(() -> { throw new ...; })` with `.orElseThrow()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.orElseGet(() -> { throw new ...; })` with `.orElseThrow()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.orElseGet(() -> { throw new ...; })` with `.orElseThrow()`
Stream call chain may be simplified: replace `.orElseGet(() -> { throw new ...; })` with `.orElseThrow()`
